description_long: This is a tall, intricately detailed stone sculpture depicting a crucifixion scene. At the top, a cross supports a figure of Jesus Christ with outstretched arms, his body rendered with realistic anatomical detail. Below the cross, several other human figures are sculpted in relief, appearing to be in various poses of mourning or reverence, their garments and expressions carefully carved. The base of the sculpture is rounded and textured, suggesting a rocky foundation. The rear of the sculpture is flat and unadorned, while the sides reveal the depth and layering of the figures. The entire piece is rendered in a weathered gray stone, giving it a solemn and historical appearance.
description: A tall, gray stone crucifixion sculpture with multiple human figures in relief below the cross, featuring detailed carving and a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full crucifixion scene with Jesus on the cross and several figures below, all details clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the relief and the layered arrangement of the figures, with the cross and figures in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, flat back of the cross and sculpture, with no visible figures or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the profile of the cross and figures, highlighting the three-dimensional relief work.
attribute_subject_matter: Crucifixion of Jesus Christ with mourning figures
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate setting.
